title: TFC Metal Tools
description: advanced recipes, elements  for metal tools and weapons TFC
body:
**Addon that introduces advanced recipes for TFC tools and weapons**

**Construction of each weapon and metal tool will consist of several or a dozen elements that must be joined together and previously forged on an anvil to produce this tool**

* added handles
* added smaller items such as rings and rivets
* added leather bindings and metal wires
* crossguard and pommel were added as components in the construction of swords

![advanced tools TFC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EyoW5jVb/images/1454941e4d4e48b04f7b23ee986167a6bf0896b0.png)
![split](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EyoW5jVb/images/1fcc14e2b4c31d9a575f249683fd09a1976707c2.png)
